Dear  AMRITA MOHUNTA,
Microsoft India Corporation (“Microsoft”), hereby confirms that as of the date of this letter, INSPIRE I-
TECH SERVICES PRIVATE LIMITED (“Company”) is currently licensed by Microsoft under a Microsoft Global 
Partner Agreement (“GPA Terms”) to distribute the software products set forth in the license agreement. 
In accordance with the GPA Terms, Company, as an authorized distributor of Microsoft software products 
(“Microsoft Software”), may install the Microsoft Software onto Company computer devices and distribute 
the Microsoft Software together with the computer devices. 
You may provide this letter to authorized governmental agencies, customs authorities and/or regulatory 
authorities on a need-to-know basis as may be required for the sole purpose of confirming Company’s right 
to preinstall and distribute the Microsoft Software licensed under the GPA Terms with computer devices, 
and provided that this letter is treated as confidential information under a confidentiality agreement 
between Company and such agency or authority, as appropriate. 
Sincerely,
George Hawk
Contracts & Billing Group Manager, Consumer Operations
Account Manager (cc via email):  v-saupatil@microsoft.com

UNDERTAKING 
 
 
We, INSPIRE I-TECH SERVICES PVT. LTD., OEM of “I-COMP” Desktop Computers hereby undertakes that as 
per Buyer’s Additional Terms & Condition, Faulty Hard Disk of Desktop Computers will not be returned back 
to the OEM/supplier against warranty replacement. 
 
If any part is replaced by us in the warranty period, warranty of the part should also be equivalent to the desktop 
and laptop original warranty period. 
 
This Certificate of Undertaking has been issued as per the requirement under the above referred Gem Bid. 
 
 
For INSPIRE I-TECH SERVICES PVT. LTD.

We, Infinity seller of “I-COMP” Desktop Computers undertake that we will be providing Warranty as 
per the terms and condition of the said bid. 
 
We offer 3 years onsite warranty of our offered product. 
 
The warranty shall cover 100% efficiency of the product supplied by the bidder of “I-COMP”. 
 
We are a Registered Company having our Registered Office in India and have complete set-up to 
provide After Sales Support in India. 
 
We also undertake that we have proven facilities for Training, repair, and Service Center Support in 
India at least for the past three years.  
 
We, Infinity. undertake that neither we nor of our Director(s) are banned or suspended or black listed 
by any Government / Public Sector Undertaking / Corporate organization or convicted in any Court 
of Law across India or declared Bankrupt or insolvent in last 3 years. 
 
 
This Certificate of Undertaking has been issued as per the requirement under the above referred Gem 
Bid. 
 
 
Yours faithfully, 
 
For INFINITY
